SEARCH

Uses of Package
server.control

Packages that use server.control
Package
Description
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.scheduler
Server-side timed jobs: reminders, confirmation timeouts, waiting-list grab expiry, and no-show marking.
  • Classes in server.control used by server.control
    Class
    Description
    DomainController
    A handler for one domain's slice of the server's request space (orders, reservations, parks, …).
    NotificationService
    Small stateless helper that other controllers call to send a notification to a single recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
    PricingService
    Computes the price of a reservation, in the same unit as reservation.price_cents.
  • Classes in server.control used by server.net
    Class
    Description
    DomainController
    A handler for one domain's slice of the server's request space (orders, reservations, parks, …).
  • Classes in server.control used by server.scheduler
    Class
    Description
    NotificationService
    Small stateless helper that other controllers call to send a notification to a single recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
    ReservationController
    Owns the reservation & waiting-list domain (create/get/update/cancel/list, confirm, join/leave waitlist, accept grab).
